_comment: Active research state for Auto Audio Depth Estimation. One study = one structural hypothesis and its HPO/confirmation progression. When a study concludes, append a PASS/FAIL row to hypotheses.tsv, update archive.json, then open the next study. Adaptive-HPO ladder: structural-screen -> 3 -> 5 -> 7 -> 10, each extension justified by evidence. Never crown on <2-3 confirming draws (S10/E125 lesson).

concluded_studies.note: L/R-equivariance training is redundant with the free eval-time TTA and costs an anneal epoch (E131 budget-bust; E132 comp 2.0925 > champion 2.079). See hypotheses.tsv.
4th TTA draw E133=2.0935; 4-draw mean 2.0827 +-0.008, ~2 sigma below old baseline 2.099. Champion settled.

active_study.general_hypothesis: Eval-time L/R-flip TTA (S12) averages the two symmetric views uniformly (50/50), but a model's error is spatially structured (near vs far, source-side vs shadow-side), so the two mirrored views are probably not equally reliable at every pixel; a per-pixel reliability weighting could beat uniform averaging without changing the depth model.
active_study.detailed_hypothesis: Add a lightweight per-pixel confidence head trained (on the DETACHED depth, so it does not alter depth training) to predict the local depth error; at eval, blend the original and flipped-back predictions weighted by predicted precision instead of 50/50.
active_study.experiment_note: E134: split the depth head into a shared trunk + a 1-ch confidence head; add a small aux loss regressing confidence to |D.detach()-gt|; in evaluate(), precision-weight the TTA blend by exp(-conf).
open_risks: Symmetry argues uniform 50/50 is near-optimal for two equally-good views, so the expected gain is small; screen once and FAIL fast if within noise.
The confidence head + aux loss add complexity; per the simplicity criterion it must earn a clear >noise gain to keep.
active_study.decision_rule: Structural screen (1 run). Judge honest composite vs champion 4-draw mean 2.083. Only a clear <~2.075 draw warrants confirmation; a within-noise (2.07-2.09) or worse result -> FAIL S16, revert `git checkout 494b5e2 -- train.py`, and surface PROPOSAL-01 (acoustic representation) as the recommended next major direction for the operator.

backlog.idea: PROPOSAL-01: the input STFT + spatial-cue construction is fixed inside prepare.py, so the audio representation (the one genuinely unexplored, physically-motivated axis: multi-resolution STFT, early/late echo split, cross-channel coherence) cannot be searched from train.py. This is the most promising path to a NEW real gain but requires the gated prepare.py refactor in program.md PROPOSAL-01 (keep split/target/metric fixed; verify baseline byte-equivalence). Flag for the operator.

Confidence-weighted TTA: a lightweight per-pixel confidence head to blend the two L/R views non-uniformly instead of 50/50. Extends the winning TTA lineage. Symmetry argues uniform is near-optimal, so screen cheaply.
Only if a NEW complementary mechanism appears; geometry axis is saturated at all cheap scales.
